about:
## About Stream Archive

Your favourite live streams disappear when they end. Stream Archive is a cloud-based tool that records and saves live broadcasts automatically so you can rewatch them anytime.

### Automatic Stream Recording

Add your favourite streamers and recording happens automatically in the background — no software to install, no manual scheduling. Streams are captured and saved to the cloud as they happen.

### Watch & Download Anytime

All saved streams are stored securely and ready to watch. Access recordings through the built-in player, download them for offline viewing, or share them with friends.

### TikTok, Twitch, YouTube, Bigo, Tango & More

Whether you watch streams on TikTok, Twitch, YouTube, Bigo, Tango, Kick, AfreecaTV, or Pandalive — Stream Archive supports them all. Record across multiple platforms, all organized in one place.

### No Screen Recorder Needed

Unlike a screen recorder that requires your computer to stay on, Stream Archive runs in the cloud 24/7. No software needed. Streams are recorded automatically even when you're not watching.

### Free to Get Started

Create an account and start saving your favourite streams today. Upgrade to premium for downloading recordings, extended storage, and more features.
